policy.note: This guard validates owner answer intake only. It never applies answers to decision sessions.

findings.message: Intake must not record decisions.
Intake must not write session files.
Intake must not write public files.
Intake must not write public manifests.
Intake must keep public_ready_after_intake at 0.
Source-root answer block must exist.
Source-root selected_decision must be null or an allowed decision.
Source-root safe default must match answer sheet.
Source-root intake must not contain a public-ready flag.
Owner card answer count must match answer sheet cards.
Owner card batch-a-villa-savoye-image-candidates must exist in answer sheet.
Owner card batch-a-villa-savoye-image-candidates choice must be null or allowed.
Owner card batch-a-villa-savoye-image-candidates must keep public_ready_after_card at 0.
Owner card batch-b-villa-savoye-derived-files must exist in answer sheet.
Owner card batch-b-villa-savoye-derived-files choice must be null or allowed.

Reference decision villa-savoye-exterior-savoye-3-cc0 must keep public_ready_after_decision false.

next_actions: If filled_answers is 0, keep waiting for owner input.
If filled_answers is greater than 0, Codex/Claude may prepare a separate reviewed session edit plan.
Do not apply source-root or owner decisions without explicit owner confirmation and follow-up checks.
